testcase.name: test_10_accept_receipt_with_incident
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_incident_tickets_71.py:279: in test_10_accept_receipt_with_incident assert resp.status_code == 200, f"Failed to accept: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to accept: {"detail":"Insufficient stock for 'Animal Feed Deluxe 1kg' in source branch: have 0, need 7"} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_11_get_incident_ticket_detail
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_incident_tickets_71.py:297: in test_11_get_incident_ticket_detail assert resp.status_code == 200, f"Failed: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Failed: {"detail":"Ticket not found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_incident_tickets_71.py:335: in test_12_assign_ticket assert resp.status_code == 200, f"Failed to assign: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to assign: {"detail":"Ticket not found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_25_verify_audit_log_created
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_incident_tickets_71.py:632: in test_25_verify_audit_log_created assert data["status"] == "received" E AssertionError: assert 'received_pending' == 'received' E E - received E + received_pending

testcase.name: test_26_summary_reflects_closed_ticket

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected at least 1 closed ticket: {'open': 0, 'investigating': 0, 'resolved': 0, 'closed': 0, 'total_unresolved_capital_loss': 0, 'total_unresolved_retail_loss': 0} assert 0 >= 1

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_incident_tickets_71.py:663: in test_26_summary_reflects_closed_ticket assert data["closed"] >= 1, f"Expected at least 1 closed ticket: {data}" E AssertionError: Expected at least 1 closed ticket: {'open': 0, 'investigating': 0, 'resolved': 0, 'closed': 0, 'total_unresolved_capital_loss': 0, 'total_unresolved_retail_loss': 0} E assert 0 >= 1
